system.description: Reach out and grab the fabric of Reality. Tear it and roll [quality].
system.synopsis: Tear a hole into another space

outcomes.success:
you create a Rip in Reality that leads to a parallel space the Agency calls the Lobby. Doing so releases a small swarm of Ripples, congealed thoughts that have not yet combined with enough others to break through into Reality themselves. They are small, chaotic, and dangerous. They tend to appear as simple combinations of the kinds of things people in the area are thinking about (crabs + beer bottles, stock tickers + rats, radios + dumplings, etc.)

Ripples are highly suggestible and will quickly begin attempting to eat stable minds. They are very effective distractions and can cause a lot of destruction quickly, but they dissipate naturally after a few minutes. The Rip, too, naturally heals within an hour.

Putting things into the Rip is not recommended, but will likely not have any immediate effects beyond making that thing irretrievable.
outcomes.every3rd3: you can give the swarm of Ripples a simple one-word command (fight, scatter, play, etc.) which they will try to perform before they dissipate.
outcomes.failure: you create a Rip that holds itself open. Ripples pour from the hole, out of your control, and target Resonants and Anomalies first and foremost. This Rip can only be closed by forcing a Minor Anomaly into its opening.
